basicInfo.name: Reginleif
basicInfo.flavor: Upon the death of Freyr, a hero of the Celestial Realm, even Freyja vanished from the public eye. After Reginleif was healed and regained control of her magical powers, she decided to devote all of her efforts into defending the Celestial Realm according to Freyr's dying wishes.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict 1 stack(s) of Magic Vulnerability. [Max 4 Stack(s)] (If deployed to a team with 5 or more Magic heroes.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Magic Attack.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Changes Number of Targets: To 2 Enemies

Skill 1.name: Advent of Light
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - For each debuff on the target, deals additional damage equal to 9% of Magic Attack to each attack. [Max 8 Stack(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 65% of Magic Attack 2 time(s). [Additional 30% Crit Rate]
 - 100% chance to inflict 2 stack(s) of Magic Vulnerability. [Max 4 Stack(s)] (If deployed to a team with 5 or more Magic heroes.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 75% of Magic Attack.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Increases Effect: Crit Rate to 100%.

Skill 2.name: Interstellar Rift
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 42% of Magic Attack plus 5% of the target's Max HP 3 time(s). [Additional 30% Crit Rate] (HP-based damage limited to 50% of caster's Attack.)
 - 55% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict 2 stack(s) of Magic Vulnerability. [Max 4 Stack(s)] (If deployed to a team with 5 or more Magic heroes.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Adds Effect: 55% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Increases Effect: Crit Rate to 100%.

Passive.name: Secret of Harmony
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity when HP falls to 70% or lower. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - Grants Final Judgment upon gaining Immortality. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Defense Reduction. [Always Active]
 - Inflicts Incoming Healing Reduction. [Always Active]
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 32% of the caster's Magic Attack every time a basic attack is used 2 time(s) or a skill is used 1 time(s). (If deployed to a team with 5 or more Magic heroes.)
 - Grants 1 Debuff Removal(s) every time a basic attack is used 2 time(s) or a skill is used 1 time(s). (If deployed to a team with 5 or more Magic heroes.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Adds Effect: 24% Defense Reduction. [Always Active]

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Freyja, Freyr, classy things, her gift from Freyja, steak, mead, peace, harmony
profile.dislikes: Things that disturb peace, things that lack class, cheap food, chaos
profile.story: Upon the death of Freyr, a hero of the Celestial Realm, even Freyja vanished from the public eye. After Reginleif was healed and regained control of her magical powers, she decided to devote all of her efforts into defending the Celestial Realm according to Freyr's dying wishes.

basicInfo.name: Reginleif
basicInfo.flavor: Through family connections, Reginleif made two friends, Freyr and Freyja.\nDespite their differing personalities, the three became extremely close friends, each filling the others' gaps.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict 1 stack(s) of Magic Vulnerability. [Max 4 Stack(s)] (If deployed to a team with 5 or more Magic heroes.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

 - Increases Effect: Crit Rate Boost to 30%.

 - Increases Effect: Crit Rate Boost to 30%.

basicInfo.name: Reginleif
basicInfo.flavor: Born as the only daughter of a prestigious family of the Celestial Realm, Reginleif possessed powerful magic but was frail and sickly.\nShe spent her childhood receiving treatment, confined to her room and completely cut off from the outside world.
